title: The man who stops chasing a wife
caption:
The man who stops chasing a wife isn't giving up.

He's getting the order right.

There's a version of you that has "ready for a relationship" as a perpetual next thing — after the promotion, after the apartment, after you feel like you've arrived. And underneath it, if you're honest, is the assumption that she'll make you whole when she comes.

She won't. She can't. And every woman worth marrying can feel the pressure of a man who's building his identity on her arrival.

The way out isn't lowering expectations. It's the seek-first principle. Matthew 6:33 isn't a life-hack — it's a sequence. The man who chases God first becomes the man who brings something real into a relationship instead of trying to extract something out of it.

A man who prays becomes a man who can hold weight. A man who reads the Word becomes a man with something to say. A man who confesses his sin becomes a man who isn't hiding.

That's the man she's looking for. Not perfect. Anchored.

Stop running two timelines. There is only one first move.

—

Comment "first" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #christiandating #discipleship #masculinity #christianity #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
